title: Episode log entry
description: One JSON object per line in docs/episodes/<YYYY-MM>.jsonl. One entry corresponds to one Work Item / one PR / one merge.

schema_version.description: Schema version for forward-compat migrations. Bump on incompatible shape changes; never break existing grep contracts.

feature_slug.description: Kebab-case slug for the parent feature; matches docs/product/<slug>.md when present.

task_type.description: Conventional Commits type. Must stay in sync with CLAUDE.md "Git" section and docs/agents/plane/tasks.md § 6.

status.description: Terminal episode status. Episodes are only logged after PR merge, so the only value emitted today is "merged". Future statuses (e.g. "abandoned") would require a schema_version bump.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp; first scratchpad write or first phase-state.md update for this task.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp; PR mergedAt per gh pr view --json mergedAt.

branch.description: Git branch the implementation lived on before merge.

plane_work_item_id.description: Plane Work Item code (typically equals task_id).

plane_epic_id.description: Plane Epic code that this Work Item rolls up to.

prd_link.description: Repo-relative path to the PRD on main, or null if the episode predates docs/product/ (standalone-mode replay of an old PR).

design_link.description: Repo-relative path to the design on main, null if /design was skipped (trivial feature) or the episode predates docs/designs/.

plan_link.description: Repo-relative path to the plan on main, or null if standalone-mode replay.

session_ids.description: Machine-local pointers into .claude/logs/<skill>/<run-dir>/ via the skill-logger meta.json. May be empty if skill-logger meta.json is missing for this run — see architecture § 9.6.

phases_run.description: Phase names that ran for this episode, in order. Free-form strings; common values are "research", "prd", "design", "plan", "tasks", "implement", "review".

parallel_with.description: Sibling Work Item ids that ran in parallel with this one. Human-curated at log time; may be empty.

cycles.description: Number of writer/reviewer cycles before approval. 1 = approved on first review; 2 = one round of changes-required.

verdict.description: Final reviewer verdict at episode close.

critical_findings_addressed.description: Number of Critical findings the writer addressed across all cycles. Optional.

cycles.description: Number of writer/reviewer cycles before approval. 1 = approved on first review; 2 = one round of changes-required.

verdict.description: Final reviewer verdict at episode close.

critical_findings_addressed.description: Number of Critical findings the writer addressed across all cycles. Optional.

cycles.description: Number of writer/reviewer cycles before approval. 1 = approved on first review; 2 = one round of changes-required.

verdict.description: Final reviewer verdict at episode close.

critical_findings_addressed.description: Number of Critical findings the writer addressed across all cycles. Optional.

cycles.description: Number of writer/reviewer cycles before approval. 1 = approved on first review; 2 = one round of changes-required.

verdict.description: Final reviewer verdict at episode close.

critical_findings_addressed.description: Number of Critical findings the writer addressed across all cycles. Optional.

reviews.description: Per-phase reviewer telemetry. Keys are optional; an absent key means that reviewer did not run for this episode.

duration_min_total.description: Total wall-clock minutes start to merge. Null when not auto-extractable (standalone-mode replay).

duration_min_by_phase.description: Per-phase wall-clock minutes. Null when not auto-extractable.

files_touched_count.description: Files changed in the merged PR (git diff). Null when not auto-extractable.

test_count_added.description: Net test cases added in the merged PR. Null when not auto-extractable.

what.description: The chosen approach, in one sentence.

why.description: The justification — why this beat the rejected alternatives.

rejected.description: Alternatives considered and not taken, each with a brief reason.

confidence.description: Confidence label. Recommended vocabulary per architecture § 9.3: "verified" (backed by tests or production metric) or "provisional" (works, but not proven optimal). Left as a free string for now; tighten via schema_version bump if the vocabulary stabilises.

decisions.description: Architecturally significant choices made during this episode.

what.description: What blocked progress, in one sentence.

duration_min.description: Wall-clock minutes lost to this blocker.

tag.description: Short topical tag. See architecture § 9.3 for recommended vocabulary (external-api, tooling, requirement-unclear, flaky-test, env-config, local-context-mismatch, over-decomposition).

blockers.description: Friction encountered during this episode that delayed progress.

why_failed.description: Why it didn't work, in enough detail to deter future re-attempts.

dead_ends.description: Approaches tried and abandoned. Useful for future grep against "have we tried X?".

learnings.description: One-line distilled lessons. Captured here so they remain greppable even when the source PR is forgotten.

tags.description: Free-form topical tags for grep-based discovery. See architecture § 9.3 for recommended vocabularies.
